modifications: Changed loop from `for state in &states` to `for (i, state) in states.iter().enumerate()` to capture state index
Added conditional separator rendering between state groups using 80-character horizontal line
Applied styling using existing `DIM` and `RESET` constants
Prevented trailing separator after last state group with `if i < states.len() - 1` guard

patterns_discovered.context: Converting simple iteration to enumerated when index needed for conditional rendering
patterns_discovered.benefit: Cleaner than manual counter variable; leverages Rust iterator API

patterns_discovered.context: Using `i < states.len() - 1` to exclude final separator
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents visual artifact of trailing separator line

patterns_discovered.pattern: Unicode character repetition for visual separators
patterns_discovered.benefit: Creates clean visual separation with terminal-friendly box-drawing character

patterns_discovered.context: Using `DIM` and `RESET` constants for text formatting
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent styling; assumes constants already defined in module scope

gotchas_discovered.description: Separator width is hardcoded to 80 characters; may not align with actual terminal width on narrow/wide terminals
gotchas_discovered.impact: Visual misalignment on non-standard terminal widths

gotchas_discovered.description: Code assumes `DIM` and `RESET` constants exist in scope; not verified in diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Compilation would fail if constants not defined, but code compiled successfully

gotchas_discovered.description: Enumeration introduces index tracking; must ensure comparison logic is correct for boundary condition

recommendations.recommendation: Make separator width terminal-aware instead of hardcoded to 80 characters
recommendations.rationale: Improves visual formatting across different terminal sizes; consider using `termsize` crate or terminal width detection

recommendations.recommendation: Extract separator rendering into dedicated helper function if more styling options added
recommendations.rationale: Improves code reusability and testability as visual features expand

recommendations.recommendation: Verify visual output across different terminal widths during QA
recommendations.rationale: Hardcoded width may cause misalignment on narrow terminals; visual inspection needed

recommendations.recommendation: Document the 80-character separator width assumption and styling constants used
recommendations.rationale: Future maintainers should understand design decisions and styling choices
